# Roadmap reassessment

There are some items in the inbox that need to be looked at. We should
think about how to handle them and decide what makes the most sense.

## Recommendations

We should probably reorganize the roadmap to make things clearer. Some
of the tracks could be combined, and others could potentially be split
up. It depends on how we want to approach things.

The audit has flagged a few issues that we should address. These should
be reviewed and resolved as appropriate. We could also consider adding
some new tracks if needed.

## Closures

Some items can probably be closed out. Others might need more work.
We'll have to look at each one individually.

## Next steps

Continue to monitor the situation and adjust as needed. Bring up any
concerns. Make sure everything stays on track.
